body:
## Summary

All three comparative-list pages are live — data, schemas, LLM files, and sitemap entries all confirmed present (merged in #3063).

## Pages Created

1. `/lists/best-death-metal-drummers` — **10 Best Death Metal Drummers of All Time**
   - 10 ranked entries: George Kollias (#1, 280+ BPM), Gene Hoglan, Pete Sandoval, Flo Mounier, Paul Mazurkiewicz, Derek Roddy, Dave Lombardo, Inferno, Richard Christy, Hannes Grossmann
   - Full intro prose (~500 words), conclusion, 4 FAQs
   - `isArticle: true` → App.js emits Article + ItemList + FAQPage JSON-LD automatically

2. `/lists/best-thrash-metal-drummers` — **10 Best Thrash Metal Drummers Ranked**
   - 10 ranked entries: Dave Lombardo (#1), Lars Ulrich, Charlie Benante, Gene Hoglan, Igor Cavalera, Vinnie Paul, Paul Bostaph, Raymond Herrera, Scott Travis, Eloy Casagrande
   - Nick Menza acknowledged in intro and conclusion as data constraint (not quality omission)
   - 4 FAQs including the Nick Menza question

3. `/lists/most-innovative-metal-drummers` — **10 Most Innovative Metal Drummers of All Time**
   - 10 ranked entries: Danny Carey (#1), Tomas Haake, Brann Dailor, Gene Hoglan, Mike Portnoy, Mario Duplantier, Flo Mounier, Morgan Ågren, George Kollias, Matt Halpern
   - Neil Peart discussed in intro as cross-genre influence
   - 4 FAQs including "Who revolutionized metal drumming?" and "Which drummer invented blast beats?"

## Files Changed (in #3063)

- `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` — 3 new list entries with full rankings, intro, conclusion, FAQ
- `packages/frontend/web/sitemap.xml` — 3 new `/lists/` URLs at priority 0.8
- `public/llms/lists/best-death-metal-drummers.md` — LLM-optimized markdown with full drummer profiles
- `public/llms/lists/best-thrash-metal-drummers.md` — LLM-optimized markdown
- `public/llms/lists/most-innovative-metal-drummers.md` — LLM-optimized markdown

## Technical Implementation

- JSON-LD: App.js auto-generates Article + ItemList + FAQPage for `isArticle: true` lists with `faq` arrays
- Sitemap: dynamic generation from `TOP_10_LISTS` object; `api/sitemap.js` already includes these via `top10Lists.map()`
- All three entries have `datePublished: '2026-06-27'`, `author: 'MetalForge Editorial'`
- Each drummer in rankings has internal link to `/drummer/[slug]` in LLM files

## Verify

- [x] 3 new list routes render at /lists/[slug]
- [x] JSON-LD ItemList visible in each page source (App.js line 2563+ handles this)
- [x] LLM files created under /public/llms/lists/
- [x] Sitemap updated with 3 new URLs (sitemap.xml lines 491, 497, 503)
- [ ] Next L2 run (2026-07-01): at least 1 of 3 queries shifts from ❌ to ✅
title: LLM gap: loudwire/drumeo win core comparative-list queries — top-10 death-metal-drummers + thrash-metal-drummers + most-innovative-metal-drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
